subject: Gate vsim load_elf on tier-2 hybrid resume
description:
Edit main.cpp:406-407 to skip sim.load_elf when both --shared-mem-path and --resume-from-qemu are set. Memory is already populated by QEMU1's -kernel via the shared mmap; the second load destroys phase-1 .bss writes.</description>
<parameter name="activeForm">Gating vsim load_elf on tier-2 hybrid resume
